name: claude-advisor-plugins
description: Independent second-opinion reviewer plugins that replace the built-in advisor tool, one per reviewer model.

plugins.name: fable-advisor
plugins.description: Independent second-opinion reviewer on the fable model, invoked at advisor checkpoints (before substantive work, before declaring done, when stuck, when changing approach). Stays silent on sessions that already run a fable model (manual /fable-advisor still works).
